footer.brandText: A global consulting and technology partner specializing in market research, data engineering, software services, and Generative AI.
footer.bottomTagline: Made with intent · From data to decisions

seo.title: Emulus Consulting LLP — Data-Backed Insights. AI-Driven Impact.
seo.description: Emulus is a global consulting partner for market research, data engineering, software, and Generative AI — helping enterprises and social-impact teams ship outcomes.

hero.heading:
Turn complex data into decisions that
move your business.
hero.subtitle: Emulus is a global consulting partner for market research, data engineering, software, and Generative AI — helping enterprises and social-impact teams ship outcomes, not just dashboards.

trust.text: Trusted by teams in 4 countries across pharma, BFSI & impact.

capabilities.heading:
Five capabilities,
one outcome: clarity.
capabilities.description: We combine research rigor with engineering discipline and modern AI — a single team that goes from raw data to working product, end to end.

items.title: Generative AI Consulting
items.body: Agentic workflows, RAG systems, and operationalized analytics built for production-grade reliability.

items.title: Market Research & Insights
items.body: Primary surveys, interviews, FGDs and competitive intelligence with statistical rigor and human depth.

items.title: Data Engineering & Analytics
items.body: Pipelines, warehouses, BI dashboards, and visual storytelling that drives action — not slide decks.

items.title: Software Services & Products
items.body: Full-stack product lifecycle: discovery, agile delivery, resilient deployment, and post-launch ops.

items.title: Staff Augmentation
items.body: Embed senior data scientists, ML engineers and analysts directly into your roadmap.

gvStory.heading: From Paper Ledger</br> to AI-Powered Intelligence
gvStory.description: A full-stack digital transformation that replaced paper-based ledgers with AI-powered analytics across rural India — delivering measurable impact across six operational milestones.

items.title: Paper-Based Operations
items.body: Millions of transactions recorded by hand across thousands of remote village stores — with no central visibility, no audit trail, and no path to scale.

items.title: Zero-Touch Capture
items.body: A single photograph captures every ledger page. No hardware changes, no training overhead — just a smartphone and a purpose-built vision pipeline.

items.title: Automated Extraction
items.body: Generative AI classifies, extracts, and validates structured data from unstructured handwritten entries — at scale, with configurable accuracy thresholds.

items.title: Structured Intelligence
items.body: Handwriting is normalized into a queryable data model — enabling real-time aggregation, duplicate resolution, and downstream integration.

items.title: Actionable Analytics
items.body: Dashboards and alerts surface transaction trends, inventory gaps, and regional patterns — turning raw data into operational intelligence.

items.title: Economic Empowerment
items.body: Self-employed shopkeepers gain access to credit, inventory planning, and market linkages — unlocking financial inclusion at the last mile.

pipeline.heading:
From raw data
→ insights
→ AI-driven decisions.
pipeline.description: A three-stage operating model. Every engagement begins with measurable outcomes, and ends with a live system your team owns.

stages.title: Raw Data
stages.body: We integrate sources you already have — and the ones you didn't know you needed. Surveys, sensors, systems, field teams.

stages.title: Insights
stages.body: Cleaned, modeled, contextualized. Statistical baselines meet business questions to produce signal — not noise.

stages.title: AI-Driven Decisions
stages.body: Insights operationalized through GenAI — agents, copilots and automations embedded where the work actually happens.

industries.heading:
Built for enterprises.
Honed for impact.
industries.description: Same toolkit, different velocity. We meet you where you are — whether that's a regulated pharma rollout or a field-team MIS deployed in 12 districts.

commercial.heading: Pharma, BFSI, life sciences & enterprise.
commercial.body: Decision intelligence, growth analytics and AI products built with the rigor that regulated industries require.

social.heading: Driving impact you can measure.
social.body: Custom MIS, results-monitoring platforms and analytics-driven program evaluation for NGOs and not-for-profits.

work.heading: Outcomes, not output.
work.description: A few of the engagements we're proud of — from BFSI risk models to district-scale impact dashboards.

items.title: Forecasting field-rep effectiveness across 14 markets.
items.body: Replaced a spreadsheet-driven planning cycle with a live forecasting engine and embedded LLM summaries.

items.title: Real-time credit-risk scoring on a streaming pipeline.
items.body: Cut decisioning latency from 6 hours to 90 seconds with a Spark + feature-store rebuild.

items.title: An MIS that turned 240 field workers into a real-time program.
items.body: Offline-first data collection + a results-monitoring dashboard funders can read at a glance.

testimonial.quote: Emulus didn't sell us a dashboard — they re-wrote how our commercial team makes decisions. Eight weeks in, we'd pulled an entire planning cycle forward.
testimonial.name: Nikhil Kapoor

cta.heading: Ready to turn your data into decisions?
cta.subtitle: Scope a 30-minute discovery call. No slides, no fluff — just your data and what's possible with it.

seo.title: About — Emulus Consulting LLP
seo.description: Vision, purpose, values, and the team driving meaningful transformations through data and AI.

hero.title: Consistently driving meaningful transformations through every engagement.
hero.subtitle: We transform complex data into actionable insights using best-in-class techniques, empowering businesses and social enterprises to achieve exceptional results.

visionPurpose.heading:
A clear vision.
A defined purpose.
visionPurpose.description: Two statements that orient every engagement — the destination we're heading toward, and the reason we exist as a firm.

vision.heading: Consistently drive meaningful transformations in our clients' businesses through every engagement.

purpose.heading: Transform complex data into actionable insights, empowering exceptional results.

values.heading: Three principles that shape every engagement.
values.description: These aren't just wall-art values — they're operational commitments that show up in how we staff, scope, and deliver work.

items.title: Trusted Partners
items.body: Customer-focused, long-term partnerships built on transparency and outcomes.

items.title: Respect for the Individual
items.body: Open to ideas, value contribution, and foster creativity in every engagement.

items.title: Learn and Grow
items.body: Continuous learning, upskilling, and knowledge sharing across our global team.

team.heading: A global team grounded in research, engineering, and impact.
team.description: Senior practitioners who've led data and AI work across pharma, BFSI, NGOs, and enterprise — and do it again for every client.

members.name: Harish Brahmanyapura
members.bio: Over 25 year's market research experience with top market research agencies in India, Far East & Africa. Held leadership roles with the Kantar group - IMRB & Millward Brown.

members.name: Vineet Garg
members.bio: Over 14 years of consulting and analytics experience across domains. Helmed multiple roles with companies like BCG, XL Catlin and WNS Global.

members.name: Praveen Srikantaiah
members.bio: 15+ yrs in insights across North America. Prior roles at Microsoft, Cisco, and LatentView — consumer goods, tech, and aviation.

members.name: Jonathan Carney
members.bio: Veteran pharma consultant with 30+ years advising on commercial strategy and growth. Formerly led IQVIA's UK Commercial Effectiveness Practice; senior roles at Novartis, Bristol-Myers Squibb, Schering-Plough.

members.name: Sidharth Zutshi
members.bio: Over 15 years in Research and Analytics including roles at IQVIA, Accenture, and WNS. Sidharth specializes in delivering custom, data-driven solutions across various industries.

members.name: Milind Sattur
members.bio: Over 26 years of experience across media research, advertising sales support and business development across Asia Pacific with companies like CNBC, Nokia interactive.

members.name: Neha Bhatia
members.bio: Over 15 years of experience on both agency and client side in market research; strong capabilities in insight generation and reporting.

presence.heading: Global, but local — wherever our clients work.
presence.description: Four offices, one operating model. Every engagement is run by senior practitioners, not handed off to junior teams.

section.heading:
Results that speak
for themselves.
section.description: Every engagement has a measurable outcome. Here are a few — from BFSI risk models to district-scale impact dashboards.

items.title: Field MIS that scaled to 2M+ student records
items.body: We built a low-bandwidth field data platform with offline-first sync and dashboards used by district teams.

items.title: Generative AI for medical insight synthesis
items.body: RAG pipeline over internal research repositories cut analyst time on literature review by 64%.

items.title: Impact measurement for water & livelihoods
items.body: Designed an outcomes framework and dashboards tracking 14 indicators across 800+ villages.

items.title: Customer intelligence on a modern stack
items.body: Re-platformed analytics with a lakehouse and rolled out 12 cross-functional BI products in 4 months.

hero.title: Plug in expert talent. Or join a team that does.

staffAug.heading: Your team, extended with senior practitioners.

reasons.title: Embed our experts

reasons.title: Flexible engagements

reasons.title: Knowledge transfer
reasons.body: We hand-off cleanly with documentation, playbooks and training built-in.
